Data Centers and Artificial Intelligence – Arizona Knowledge Exchange and Strategy Initiative

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Project: Data Centers and Artificial Intelligence – Arizona Knowledge Exchange and Strategy Initiative Arizona State University, through the Julie Ann Wrigley Global Futures Laboratory and Energy Forward, is leading a multi-stakeholder initiative to better understand and shape the rapid expansion...
